creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
Deleting my poudriere ports tree seems to have fixed the problem I had above.  lang/smlnj now builds correctly for me.  Thanks for your help Johannes in helping me fix my issue.

BTW, did we miss something at the end of 2018 or can we close PR 233980?
(After PR 234532 was committed on New Year's Eve.)

I also believe PR 233980 can be closed now since lang/smlnj builds correctly for me now. Once again thanks a lot for the hard work on the port.
